title: Address
description: An Address object contains full street address information for a specific Australia Post outlet or facility.

type.description: Type of address. There are three possible enumerated values: STREET_ADDRESS, PARCEL_COLLECT and COLLECTION_POINT.

country_code.description: An alphabetical two-digit country identification code, as specified in the ISO 3166-2 standard.

country_name.description: The name of the country (as written in English), represented by the country_code field.

geo_location.description: An object containing the precise coordinate location of an Australia Post outlet or facility.

delivery_point_id.description: A unique numeric identification code that represents a point to which Australia Post delivers or receives deliveries.
